title: 10 best herbal creams for chickenpox
description: Elder creams helps with chickenpox because they provide relief from the itching, inflammation, and redness associated with this common childhood illness. The antiviral and anti-inflammatory properties of elder flowers and leaves help to soothe the skin, reducing the discomfort and distress caused by the rash. Additionally, elder creams can aid in promoting healing and preventing infection, allowing children to recover more comfortably and quickly from chickenpox....
